subject: feat(fonts): load Inter from Google Fonts for consistent rendering
body:
Inter was declared in the CSS --font-sans token but never loaded
externally — only rendered for users with it installed locally.
Added preconnected Google Fonts link with weights 400/500/600/700.
Workbox runtime caching for Google Fonts was already configured.

Tags: styling, infrastructure
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: dark-theme
Semver: patch

title: load Inter from Google Fonts for consistent rendering
